violations.text: Facility is lacking an allergen statement on menu or at point of service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. A PIC is currently enrolled in class. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Inspector observed eggs stored over fish in the rear refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Establishment is using Time as a Public Health Control without approval or required records. Application and documentation was provided and must be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Water disposed. Discussed options. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dining area and over sandwich prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Hot water was lacking at the hand sink in the kitchen area. PIC stated there was a leak in the system. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered, with excess garbage. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC stated pick-up is scheduled for today. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -prep tables (laminate cracked) -walls and junctures near back door -several ceiling tiles peeling or missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Inspector observed prep tables throughout establishment to be chipping with exposed wood. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Inspector observed bottom pipe of toilet to be leaking into a bucket. PIC called for service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Inspector observed wall behind 3 bay sink to be separated with exposed wood. Inspector observed wall behind prep sink to be chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
